title: [FIRRTL] Context Dependent Port Parsing
body:
The following circuit is currently valid, but fails parsing:

```scala
circuit Tricky:
  module Tricky:
    input input: UInt<1>
    output output: UInt<1>
    output <= input
```

```bash
firtool Tricky.fir
# Tricky.fir:5:12: error: expected port name
#     output <= input
```
